name: Cube
description: A solid box shape with 6 flat square faces and 8 corners.
funFact: A cube has 6 faces that are all perfect squares!
svgTemplate: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{size}" height="{size}"><defs><linearGradient id="cubeTop" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4dd8e0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00a8b5"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cubeLeft" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00899a"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#006070"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cubeRight" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00bcd4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#007a8a"/></linearGradient></defs><polygon points="100,30 170,65 100,100 30,65" fill="url(#cubeTop)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><polygon points="30,65 100,100 100,170 30,135" fill="url(#cubeLeft)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><polygon points="100,100 170,65 170,135 100,170" fill="url(#cubeRight)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

name: Sphere
description: A perfectly round solid ball shape with a curved surface.
realWorldExamples: ⚽ soccer balls, 🌍 the Earth, 🎱 pool balls
funFact: Every point on a sphere is the same distance from the center!
svgTemplate: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{size}" height="{size}"><defs><radialGradient id="sphereGrad" cx="35%" cy="35%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4a7ba7"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00d4ff"/></radialGradient></defs><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="80" fill="url(#sphereGrad)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

name: Cylinder
description: A solid tube shape with 2 circular faces and 1 curved side.
funFact: A cylinder can roll in one direction but not the other!
svgTemplate: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{size}" height="{size}"><defs><linearGradient id="cylBody" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#006070"/><stop offset="40%" stop-color="#00bcd4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#005060"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cylTop" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4dd8e0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00a8b5"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="40" y="55" width="120" height="100" fill="url(#cylBody)"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="155" rx="60" ry="22" fill="#005060" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="40" y1="55" x2="40" y2="155" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="160" y1="55" x2="160" y2="155" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="55" rx="60" ry="22" fill="url(#cylTop)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

name: Pyramid
description: A solid shape with a square base and triangular faces meeting at a point.
funFact: The Great Pyramid of Giza is over 4,500 years old!
svgTemplate: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{size}" height="{size}"><defs><linearGradient id="pyrLeft" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00bcd4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#006070"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="pyrRight" x1="1" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4dd8e0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00899a"/></linearGradient></defs><polygon points="100,25 35,150 100,175" fill="url(#pyrLeft)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><polygon points="100,25 165,150 100,175" fill="url(#pyrRight)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><polygon points="35,150 165,150 100,175" fill="#005060" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

name: Cone
description: A solid shape with a circular base and a curved surface coming to a point.
realWorldExamples: 🍦 ice cream cones, 🎄 pine trees, 🎉 party hats
funFact: A cone has a point called an apex at the very top!
svgTemplate: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{size}" height="{size}"><defs><linearGradient id="coneBody" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#006070"/><stop offset="40%" stop-color="#00bcd4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#005060"/></linearGradient></defs><path d="M100,30 L160,150 L40,150 Z" fill="url(#coneBody)" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="150" rx="60" ry="22" fill="#005060" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
